title: _TECHMAP_BITS_CONNMAP_ is 1 bit too small
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

`./yosys -p "design -copy-to sub sub; hierarchy -auto-top; techmap -map %sub top; dump top" techmap.v`
```
module top(input i, output o);
sub s(i, 1'b0, o);
endmodule

module sub(input a, b, output o);
parameter _TECHMAP_BITS_CONNMAP_ = 0;
parameter [_TECHMAP_BITS_CONNMAP_-1:0] _TECHMAP_CONNMAP_a_ = 0;
parameter [_TECHMAP_BITS_CONNMAP_-1:0] _TECHMAP_CONNMAP_b_ = 0;
wire [31:0] BITS_CONNMAP = _TECHMAP_BITS_CONNMAP_;
wire [_TECHMAP_BITS_CONNMAP_-1:0] CONNMAP_a = _TECHMAP_CONNMAP_a_;
wire [_TECHMAP_BITS_CONNMAP_-1:0] CONNMAP_b = _TECHMAP_CONNMAP_b_;
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

Expect `\s.BITS_CONNMAP` (below) to be at least 3 bits, since first 4 values are reserved.
Expect `\s.CONNMAP_a` != `\s.CONNMAP_b` since they aren't shorted

## Actual behavior

```
attribute \top 1
attribute \src "techmap.v:1"
module \top

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:5"
  wire \s.A

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:5"
  wire \s.B

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:5"
  wire \s.o

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:9"
  wire width 32 \s.BITS_CONNMAP

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:10"
  wire width 2 \s.CONNMAP_a

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:11"
  wire width 2 \s.CONNMAP_b

  attribute \src "techmap.v:1"
  wire output 3 \o

  attribute \src "techmap.v:1"
  wire input 2 \j

  attribute \src "techmap.v:1"
  wire input 1 \i

  connect \s.BITS_CONNMAP 2
  connect \s.CONNMAP_a 2'00
  connect \s.CONNMAP_b 2'00
end
```
code_blocks:
attribute \top 1
attribute \src "techmap.v:1"
module \top

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:5"
  wire \s.A

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:5"
  wire \s.B

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:5"
  wire \s.o

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:9"
  wire width 32 \s.BITS_CONNMAP

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:10"
  wire width 2 \s.CONNMAP_a

  attribute \src "techmap.v:2|techmap.v:11"
  wire width 2 \s.CONNMAP_b

  attribute \src "techmap.v:1"
  wire output 3 \o

  attribute \src "techmap.v:1"
  wire input 2 \j

  attribute \src "techmap.v:1"
  wire input 1 \i

  connect \s.BITS_CONNMAP 2
  connect \s.CONNMAP_a 2'00
  connect \s.CONNMAP_b 2'00
end
